name: Gammy's Jewish-Yankee Noodle Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together milk, heavy cream, flour, eggs, salt, and pepper until well combined.
3. Add the cooked noodles to the mixture and stir gently by hand until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. Grease an oven-safe pan.
5. Pour the noodle pudding mixture into the prepared pan.
6. If desired, sprinkle cornflakes and melted butter on top of the pudding.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour, or until set and golden brown on top.
8. Allow to cool slightly before serving.
